mnemonics: B.A.D. DATA: Biased Algorithms from Discriminatory, Amplifying, Toxic Assumptions in Training Archives.
keyPoints: Bias can be introduced through training data that reflects societal prejudices.
Algorithmic decisions can amplify existing inequalities and stereotypes.
Ethical NLP requires proactive auditing for fairness, accountability, and transparency.
commonMistakes: Assuming a model is unbiased if it performs well on aggregate metrics, ignoring subgroup performance.
Treating model output as purely objective truth without considering the potential for harmful bias.
